{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Open Heart Association
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Open Heart Association]] is a group of wizards specializing in mental magic that voluntarily turned themselves into a hive-mind to pursue greater magic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38">''The Pilot'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
